Public workflow used

free consultation, package options, booked client, postpartum support

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Keep package decisions from getting stuck between consult notes and email.
  • See booked clients, due dates, and prep tasks in one place.
  • Carry the same client record through postpartum instead of switching systems.
